synopsis: Rotten fruit returns to the branch, and gold drips down like water, A land where events beyond reason occur, a land known as “Meichi” (The Underworld) that easily claims the lives of those who dare to enter. The scholar "Ren" arrives in this godforsaken land to save his sick younger brother. Together with the guide "Tobia", "Ren" embarks on a perilous journey to obtain the “panacea,” an ancient relic of “Meichi.” A genuine dark fantasy brought to you by "Tsurubuchi Kenji", creator of “Touge Oni,” and "Konata", a rising star of the Spanish comic world. (Source: Comic Days, translated)

Will You Marry Me Because I Quit Being an Idol?
synopsis: Sato Itto is an ordinary salaryman who has been shy about love due to past trauma. One day, a school reunion is held for the first time in several years. While they are having a good time talking about the good old days, Hebo, a recently retired idol, suddenly shows up! Sato is upset to see Hebo, who was his first love in school. He tries to get over his feelings with the help of alcohol, even though he doesn't normally drink. But when he wakes up the next morning, he finds himself naked in the same bed with Hebo. As Sato desperately tries to recall what happened, Hebo-san shocked him even more by saying... "Marry me!" What will happen to this marriage between two people are absolute zeros at love? (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

Life as a Reincarnated Sage in Another World ~Gaining a Second Profession and Becoming the Strongest in the World~
synopsis: Whether at the office or at home, corporate drone Yuji Sano works all the time. So when his home PC flashes a message about him being summoned to another world, Yuji restarts his machine...only to find that he's inadvertently accepted the summons! Now in a fantasy world far removed from paperwork and computers, Yuji has just one thing on his mind: waking up from what he thinks is a dream and getting back to the mountain of work he left behind! But this other world has other plans for Yuji, who quickly discovers his Monster Tamer character class allows him to befriend slimes! And thanks to their number, those slimes help him absorb so much magical knowledge that he gains a second character class in the blink of an eye! How will Yuji wield his power now that he's the greatest sage the realm has ever known?! And what about all that paperwork?! (Source: Square Enix)

title: Super Darling!
titleNative: スーパーダーリン！
synopsis: It's not that she tries to keep to herself, exactly: It's just that everyone seems to look right through her! Naturally, Sakuya Tohno has a complex about it. She says she's just like air: ever present, but never seen. All she wants is a friend, but building relationships isn't exactly easy for someone who is, for all intents and purposes, invisible. But then she hears a legend about the "Thousand-Year Sakura" and how, if one makes a wish beneath its perpetually-blossoming boughs, it's sure to come true. So in a moment of desperation, she races to the tree, only to find four very attractive boys waiting for her... And at that moment, beneath the cherry blossoms of the ever-blooming Thousand-Year Sakura, something incredible happens! (Source: Turtle Paradise)

title: Handyman Saitou in Another World
titleNative: 便利屋斎藤さん、異世界に行く
synopsis: Serialization of the original doujin Handyman Saitou has never been anyone special. All his life, he’s had average grades, ordinary athletic skill, a commonplace job… But his unremarkable path takes a turn when he wakes up in another world. Here, warriors, wizards, and elves accompany him on quests delving deep into dungeons, and Saitou realizes for the first time what it’s like to be needed. After all, who other than the handyman could be trusted to open locked treasure chests or repair his allies’ equipment? Beginning with a simple “thank you,” this is the story of an ordinary person’s fulfilling life. (Source: Yen Press)

Aoi was taken aback to learn that the inept Fumiya was behind the username "nanashi," and she became determined to assist him in winning the "greatest game of all." title: Transformers Legends
titleNative: トランスフォーマーレジェンズ
synopsis: Starting off as 4koma and published online to promote the titular Transformers Legends toyline, with special Bonus Edition (出張版 Shutchōban) chapters of the comic packed with the toys themselves, it Initially showcased the misadventures of the Beast Wars cast re-imagined as adult Transformers fans, before eventually taking a more story-driven approach and attempting to connect all the entries of the Japanese Generation 1 anime and manga continuity into one storyline. Heavily marketed towards adult collectors and otaku in the face of the brand's dwindling popularity with children after TakaraTomy's largely unsuccessful first attempt in the mid-2000s, it attempted to change the image of the Transformers franchise, with much more "adult", often ecchi-filled humour and numerous references to fan culture. Ulltimately concluded when TakaraTomy began a brand unification with Hasbro starting with Power of the Primes, deciding to mainly sell Hasbro toys as is with minimal changes to packaging. It was eventually succeeded by the more action-oriented Generations Selects Special Comic promoting Hasbro and TakaraTomy's joint Generations Selects imprint. (Source: TFwiki, edited)

title: Drawing: Saikyou Mangaka wa Oekaki Skill de Isekai Musou Suru!
titleRomaji: Drawing: Saikyou Mangaka wa Oekaki Skill de Isekai Musou Suru!
titleNative: ドローイング 最強漫画家はお絵かきスキルで異世界無双する！
synonyms: Drawing: The Greatest Mangaka Becomes A Skilled “Martial Artist” In Another World
synopsis: Akira Kamishiro was a very successful manga author, who was diagnosed with blood cancer one day. He regretted the way he lived, where he could only build up empty relationships. Angry at his mother for asking him to send her some money, he died in a car accident. He was given a chance to choose his new mother and reincarnate in another world. Akira, not wanting to have a repeat of his past life, decided to choose an ordinary but safe life.. He was reincarnated as Akira, the only son of a magic store, with his previous life's memories. He had no talent for swordsmanship or magic, but he didn't care as he was still loved by his family. At one point, he realized that he can embody various things by "drawing a picture". That's when he noticed his cheat ability...!? This is a story of Akira who wanted to live a mediocre life in another world and his adventures to protect his peaceful place!!

synopsis: Edelis Brill, the beloved only daughter of a countess, sees herself stabbed to death by the emperor's sword in a book she discovers in her study. Seeking to change her fate, Edelis rescues the book's sole main character, the slave gladiator Lehan, and pours her endless affection into him. But! Lehan, whom she believed would protect her from the emperor's blade, has returned as the emperor, intent on her heart?! Edelis tries to escape, but Lehan's obsession grows ever stronger... Stop obsessing, divorce me! (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

synopsis: “I’m the ace of the Evil Noblewoman’s Guild…and I have to play the heroine now? But I’ve only ever played a perfect villain!” An evil villainess heads toward her happy ending. Madeline is the ace of the Evil Noblewoman’s Guild, having starred in 93 different stories to date. For her next reincarnation, she had hoped to get an easy assignment that would help her score a promotion...but finds herself the heroine in a School Life Romance Novel! But with her pride on the line, Madeline is not one to run away from a challenge. With the help of guild Navigator Leold playing a handsome instructor, can Madeline successfully become a heroine and find her happy ending? Find out in this villainess-turned-heroine romantic comedy! (Source: Comikey)

title: Replica: Revenge of the Ex-Wife
titleNative: レプリカ 元妻の復讐
synopsis: Aoi grew up constantly being made fun of and bullied for her appearance. After going through one bad experience after the other in school, she finally gets to marry the man of her dreams who loves her for who she is. However, he too eventually seeks out someone better-looking and cheats on her, resulting in their divorce. Oddly enough though... the woman he cheated on Aoi with is the same girl who bullied her throughout their school years...! Now Aoi's on a mission to get revenge on the man who cheated on her who is now married to the woman who made her life miserable. She has her face reshaped, her name changed to Sumire, and slowly begins to find her way into their lives... (Source: MangaPlaza)

title: Me and the Prez, Drinking Under the Stars
titleEnglish: Me and the Prez, Drinking Under the Stars
titleNative: 社長と酒と星
synopsis: At 24, Reina Izutsu has recently become the new president of Izutsu Printing after taking over for her late father. Young and not quite experienced, Reina wants to do her best but unfortunately comes across as harsh with her employees. Stressed and feeling lost, Reina spends an evening drowning her sorrows in beer at an empty park. She rants and vents out loud to the starry sky that she wants to give up and quit being president, just letting off steam. Except, she fails to realize that her subordinate, 37-year-old section chief Kenichi Ishizumi, heard her drunken ramblings! But rather than use this against her, Kenichi finds himself charmed by the young woman. He vows then and there to support her and help her find her way as company president, no matter what! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

titleRomaji: Taida na Akujoku Kizoku ni Tensei Shita Ore, Scenario wo Bukkowa Shitara Kikaku-gai no Maryoku de Saikyou ni Natta
titleEnglish: Reborn as an Aristocratic Scoundrel, I Broke the Game and Mastered Magic Beyond Limits!
titleNative: 怠惰な悪辱貴族に転生した俺、シナリオをぶっ壊したら規格外の魔力で最凶になった
synonyms: Reincarnated as the Lazy and Villainous Noble, I Broke the Scenario and Became the Most Formidable With Extraordinary Magic
synopsis: I don’t know how it happened, but somehow I’ve died and reincarnated into my favorite academy game. And if that wasn’t weird enough, I’m now the depraved and lazy villain, Weiss Fansent, whose misdeeds lead him to a deadly end. Something I’m determined to avoid at all costs. With little time left until the academy’s entrance exams, I have no choice but to dive headfirst into serious and grueling training. Which means swordsmanship with the S-rank adventurer Miruku Abitas, followed by intense magic practice. It was demanding and exhausting, but getting stronger means I have a better chance of avoiding my disastrous end. But I seriously underestimated just how powerful Weiss truly is, and I wind up stunning everyone at the exams! Have I somehow become more powerful than the hero? A fantasy series about changing the villain’s fate with hard work and amazing powers! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

He is the complete opposite of Aina, which makes him unappealing to her in every way. On the one hand, he is annoying, but on the other hand, she is envious of him... When Aina couldn't get her place tidied up in time, she had to cancel her date with her boyfriend, and it was going to be the worst Christmas ever. When Fukagawa-san saw her depressed, he invited her over to his place…? This is a story for the messy people. For those people who can't keep thing tidy at work and at life! synopsis: University student Mimi and her boyfriend Naoto encounter one chilling mystery after another. There’s the enigmatic neighbor woman dressed in black from head to toe—but if she’s so odd, why does it seems like there are many others like her? Then, whose eyes track Mimi’s movements from the cemetery next door? And why does a bizarre red circle drawn on a basement wall change with each passing day? Nine scary stories that really happened, drawn from the famed collection of urban legends Shin Mimibukuro (New Earmuffs), and adapted into manga by horror genius Junji Ito! Chapter 1: On the Utility Pole Chapter 2: The Woman Next Door Chapter 3: Rustling in the Grass Chapter 4: Grave Placement Chapter 5: Seashore Chapter 6: Just the Two of Us Chapter 7: Scarlet Circle Chapter 8: Sign in the Field Chapter 9: Monster Prop (Source: VIZ Media)

synopsis: "Please, use me as you wish." Lizette, a count's daughter, is a "Recaller" who remembers her previous lives, and she is now on her fourth life. In her past lives, always on her 20th birthday, she would be killed and eaten by the same demon. So to live a long life this time, Lizette retreated to a remote countryside sanctuary, where monsters don't appear, living quietly and peacefully. But one day she met Ralph, a boy she saved in her childhood. Somehow, he had become the country's hero by defeating a demon lord. If she could stay by Ralph's side, she might not have to die this time... With this in mind, Lizette accepted his proposal. "I will protect you, Lisette-sama, even if it costs me my life." While bewildered by Ralph's exceedingly heavy affection, Lizette uncovers the truth behind her repeating deaths. Will Lizette be able to live pass her 20th birthday unharmed this time?! It's the start of a romantic comedy between the heroine who doesn't want to die and the intensely doting yandere hero! (Source: Comic Brise, translated)

synopsis: Just as Haruchika Isezaki was confessing to his first love, he is suddenly summoned to another world. His summoner, the goddess Clementine, gives him an unusual mission: to make seven girls, destined to become the mothers of the next generation of heroes, fall in love again. These girls have lost their ability to love due to a curse cast by the Demon Lord. In other words, Haruchika must convince them all to fall in love with him! To return to his world and hear the answer to his confession, Haruchika accepts this mission and sets out to save another world through love. Having mastered the art of romance through his study of female psychology, his journey to fulfill their first loves begins — a romantic tale about saving another world through the power of love! (Source: Nico Nico Seiga, translated)
